prompt: In utils.py add a function slugify(s) that returns s lowercased with spaces replaced by hyphens. Then in main.py, implement make_slug(s) so it calls utils.slugify. Do not duplicate the logic in main.py.
grade: python3 -c "import main, utils; assert utils.slugify('Hello World')=='hello-world'; assert main.make_slug('A B C')=='a-b-c'; import inspect; assert 'slugify' in inspect.getsource(main.make_slug)"
